action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 achieved 0.9308 hidden accuracy with only 1 epoch/task plus 4 joint epochs, and checkpoint metadata shows validation best 0.9342. Analysis: this run is far stronger than ResNet and likely still benefits from more balanced joint fine-tuning; the current setup is stable and time cost is acceptable (~13 min), with >4h left. Decision: run the same ViT configuration longer with 8 joint epochs into a separate checkpoint directory and submit its best checkpoint using the current hflip predict.py.
